# TP Raju Constructions (TPRC)

Public architecture guide for TP Raju Constructions web platform.

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend**: Next.js (App Router), Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Lenis Scroll.
- **CMS**: Sanity integration for dynamic landing page resources.

## Public Routes
- `/`: Landing page (services list, portfolio milestones, dynamic awards, product catalog tabs, and public contact form).
- `/gallery`: Media gallery page (photos and loop-playing videos of scaffolding worksites).
- `/robots.txt`: Search crawler directions.
- `/sitemap.xml`: Sitemap indexing public routes.

## Content Models
- Publicly visible models include Scaffolding Products, Product Categories, Featured Projects, Partner Clients, Safety Awards, and Gallery Media.
